tagline: Burbank's Trusted Transmission Specialists Since the 1970s

hero.heading: Precision Transmission Repair in Burbank
hero.subheading: Family-owned since the 1970s. 5-star rated. Specializing in automatic and manual transmissions for all makes and models.

about.heading: Why Burbank Trusts Crabtree
paragraphs: For over four decades, Crabtree Automatics has been the go-to transmission shop on Magnolia Boulevard. We combine old-school craftsmanship with modern diagnostics to keep your vehicle shifting smoothly.

Every job gets our personal attention — no upselling, no shortcuts, just honest work from technicians who care. Whether it's a simple fluid service or a full rebuild, we treat every vehicle like our own.
highlights: Specialists in automatic and manual transmissions
All makes and models — foreign and domestic
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees

services.title: Full Transmission Rebuild
services.description: Complete teardown, inspection, and rebuild with quality parts and warranty coverage. We restore your transmission to peak performance.

services.title: Transmission Diagnostics
services.description: State-of-the-art computer diagnostics to pinpoint shifting issues, slipping, or unusual noises before recommending repairs.

services.title: Fluid Service & Flush
services.description: Regular fluid exchanges extend transmission life. We use manufacturer-recommended fluids for optimal protection.

services.title: Clutch Repair & Replacement
services.description: Expert clutch work for manual transmissions — from single disc to dual-mass flywheel systems.

services.title: Torque Converter Service
services.description: Diagnosis and repair of torque converter issues including shudder, overheating, and lock-up failures.

services.title: Transfer Case & Differential
services.description: 4WD and AWD drivetrain specialists. We service transfer cases, differentials, and CV joints.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: Best transmission shop in the valley. They rebuilt my Honda's transmission and it shifts better than new. Honest pricing and great communication.

reviews.name: Sandra K.
reviews.text: Brought my truck in for a second opinion. Other shops quoted me $4,000 — Crabtree fixed the actual problem for a fraction of that. Integrity matters.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: These guys are the real deal. Old-school mechanics who actually know transmissions inside and out. My car has been running perfect for two years since their rebuild.
